name: Aromaseraphy Rosemary
name_jp: アロマセラフィ－ローズマリー
desc:
1 Tuner + 1 or more non-Tuner monsters
While your LP is higher than your opponent's, all Plant-Type monsters you control gain 500 ATK and DEF. Once per turn, if you gain LP: Target 1 face-up card your opponent controls; that face-up card has its effects negated until the end of this turn.
mnst_eff:
1 Tuner + 1 or more non-Tuner monsters
While your LP is higher than your opponent's, all Plant-Type monsters you control gain 500 ATK and DEF. Once per turn, if you gain LP: Target 1 face-up card your opponent controls; that face-up card has its effects negated until the end of this turn.
eff:
1 Tuner + 1 or more non-Tuner monsters
While your LP is higher than your opponent's, all Plant-Type monsters you control gain 500 ATK and DEF. Once per turn, if you gain LP: Target 1 face-up card your opponent controls; that face-up card has its effects negated until the end of this turn.

action: Activates if you gain Life Points
mst: Negates the effects of your opponent's Effect Monsters
Negates the effects of your opponent's Spell Cards
Negates the effects of your opponent's Trap Cards
summoning: Does not require specific Synchro Materials
